checks.name: required_canonical_paths_exist
checks.expectation: every required artifact and helper path exists

checks.name: required_optional_derived_split_is_explicit
checks.expectation: required/optional/derived split is explicit in manifest and layout

checks.name: helper_report_mapping_consistent
checks.expectation: manifest helper mapping matches inventory helper entrypoints

checks.name: no_source_code_reading_dependency
checks.expectation: outer layers can discover bundle truth without source-code reading

checks.name: runtime_env_authority_not_replaced
checks.expectation: external p45/env stays authoritative and is not silently replaced

forbidden_consumption_patterns: discovering bundle contents by reading helper source code
inventing hidden artifact paths outside inventory and manifest
treating release-consumable bundle as deployment or cloud package
replacing external runtime env truth with a private temporary env
